testProfiles.title: Payment sandbox operator
testProfiles.notes: Use sandbox gateway only. Real card or bank targets are prohibited.

testProfiles.title: Refund reviewer sandbox
testProfiles.notes: Use masked refund targets and reset the queue state after execution.

testProfiles.title: Virtual account sandbox
testProfiles.notes: Use fake virtual account numbers and a disposable account ledger pack.

testProfiles.title: External auth sandbox
testProfiles.notes: Keep token expiration, reissue window, and callback endpoint separate from production.

testProfiles.title: Certificate QA operator
testProfiles.notes: Use masked certificate identities and non-production issuance flows.

testProfiles.title: Masked payment fixture
testProfiles.notes: Contains fake payer, amount, and gateway callback combinations.

testProfiles.title: Masked refund fixture
testProfiles.notes: Contains refund state transitions without real settlement targets.

testProfiles.title: Fake account ledger pack
testProfiles.notes: Contains disposable ledger entries and callback payloads for virtual account flows.

testProfiles.title: Masked identity fixture
testProfiles.notes: Contains masked identity assertions and browser callback payloads.

testProfiles.title: Masked certificate pack
testProfiles.notes: Contains fake certificate review, issuance, and audit scenarios.

testProfiles.title: Token rotation sandbox
testProfiles.notes: Track expiresAt, reset history, and reissue ownership for reusable credentials.

testProfiles.title: Expiry monitoring rule
testProfiles.notes: Verification must fail closed when only expired or production-bound credentials remain.

actionQueue.title: asset-impact baseline snapshot refresh
actionQueue.recommendedAction: Recapture baseline and rerun mode-switch smoke

actionQueue.title: token rotation sandbox expires within 5 days
actionQueue.recommendedAction: Reissue credential and record reset evidence

actionQueue.title: masked identity fixture refresh overdue
actionQueue.recommendedAction: Refresh dataset and rerun external-auth smoke
